title: gentianella propinqua subsp. arctophila
intro: Gentianella propinqua subsp. arctophila, also known as Alpine gentianella, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Gentianella propinqua subsp. arctophila include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea and vomiting, and reduce inflammation. Gentianella propinqua subsp. arctophila can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its roots can also be dried and used as a medicinal powder.
